info.title: sg-apis-mcp REST Gateway
info.description: REST interface for Singapore public data tools. Each tool is exposed as a POST endpoint.

200.description: Array of tool names and descriptions

post.summary: Look up ACRA corporate-entity records by exact entity name or UEN across the official sharded public registry.
Look up licensed builders by exact company name, UEN, builder class, or class code.
Look up registered contractors by exact company name, UEN, workhead, or grade.
Look up Board of Architects registered architects by exact architect name, registration number, or architecture firm name.
Look up Board of Architects registered architecture firms by exact firm name, email, or phone number.
Build a cross-registry business dossier across ACRA, BCA, CEA, and explicit BOA, HSA, HLB, or GeBIZ modules using company, UEN, or estate-agent identifiers.
Clear cached data. Specify an API name to clear only that API's cache, or omit to clear all.
Show cache statistics including hit rate, entry count, and disk usage.
Look up CEA salesperson registrations by exact salesperson, registration number, estate agent, or estate-agent licence number.

Build a unified civic facilities brief showing all community clubs, sports facilities, childcare centres, family services, student care, social service offices, and hawker centres near a Singapore location.
Show current sg-apis-mcp configuration including cache TTLs, rate limits, and timeouts.
Update sg-apis-mcp configuration. Changes persist in $SG_APIS_STATE_DIR/config.json (default ~/.sg-apis/config.json).
Browse data.gov.sg collections. Call without arguments to see all collections, or provide a collection name to see its datasets.
Get metadata for a specific data.gov.sg dataset. Use sg_datagov_search first to find dataset IDs.
Inspect the machine-readable resource metadata for one data.gov.sg dataset, including the current resource ID and column metadata.
Read bounded rows from one data.gov.sg datastore resource with explicit filters, pagination, and sort options.
Search data.gov.sg for datasets matching a keyword. Covers 2,000+ Singapore government datasets. Use this when no specific API covers the topic.
Search ECDA childcare centres with optional vacancy, operator, postal-code, or proximity filters.
Build a live environment brief over NEA forecast, air-quality, and rainfall signals.
Search government procurement tenders and awards from GeBIZ via data.gov.sg.
List direct non-data.gov.sg official Singapore RSS feeds available in this MCP server (NEA, weather.gov.sg, SFA, MPA, NHB).
Read official RSS feed items (NEA, weather.gov.sg, SFA, MPA, NHB) with stream-level rollback controls.
Search hawker centres in Singapore with optional proximity filtering by coordinates and radius.
Get curated HDB rental-price records from data.gov.sg, filtered by town, flat type, and month range.
Get curated HDB resale-price records from data.gov.sg, filtered by town, flat type, and month range.
Check connectivity and credential status for all Singapore government APIs.
Search HLB-licensed hotels by name, keeper name, postal code, or proximity.
Look up HSA companies licensed to import, wholesale, or manufacture health products by exact company or licence filters.
Look up HSA licensed pharmacies by exact pharmacy name, pharmacist in charge, address, or postal code.
Delete a stored API key.
List all stored API keys (values are masked).
Store an API key for a Singapore government API.
Get live LTA bus arrival timings for a Singapore bus stop, optionally filtered to one service number.
Get live LTA road-opening events with start and end timing context.
Get live LTA road-work events with start and end timing context.
Get live Singapore traffic camera image references with camera coordinates.
Get live LTA traffic incidents with incident type, location, and message.
Get live LTA train service alerts including affected MRT lines, stations, and free shuttle or bus arrangements.
Build a compact Singapore macro starter brief using MAS market data and validated SingStat GDP and CPI tables.
Get MAS exchange rates for SGD against foreign currencies. Supports latest data, an exact date, or a bounded date range.
Get MAS banking statistics. This phase supports banking data only, with latest data, an exact date, or a bounded date range.
Get MAS interest rates. This phase supports SORA only, with latest data, an exact date, or a bounded date range.
Search Singapore schools from MOE directory via data.gov.sg, filtered by level, zone, or name.
Search healthcare facilities (hospitals, clinics) from MOH directory via data.gov.sg.
Get labour market statistics from MOM via data.gov.sg.
Search MSF family service centres with optional postal-code or proximity filters.
Search MSF social service offices with optional postal-code or proximity filters.
Search MSF student care services with optional postal-code, audit-status, SCFA, or proximity filters.
Get NEA air quality readings by region, including PSI and PM2.5 metrics.
Get NEA 2-hour weather forecast data, optionally filtered to one area.
Get NEA rainfall readings by station, optionally filtered to one station ID.
List parks and nature reserves from NParks via data.gov.sg.
Convert between SVY21 (Singapore) and WGS84 (GPS) coordinate systems.
Convert a Singapore address, building name, or postal code to coordinates. Returns latitude, longitude, full address, and postal code.
Get demographic data for a Singapore planning area. Includes population totals, age distribution, ethnicity, housing type, education, and income data.
Convert coordinates to a Singapore address. Returns the nearest building, block, street, and postal code within the search radius.
Get routing directions between two Singapore locations. Supports public transport (bus/MRT), driving, walking, and cycling.
Search People's Association community clubs and PAssion WaVe outlets with optional postal-code or proximity filters.
Search People's Association residents' committee and residents' network centres with optional postal-code or proximity filters.
Build a location and property brief for one Singapore planning area, postal code, or address across OneMap, URA, HDB, and optional live context.
Get water level readings from PUB monitoring stations via data.gov.sg.
Preferred natural-language interface for Singapore data. Plans or executes bounded workflows over the direct sg_* tools and returns transparent step metadata.
Look up a local tool invocation audit record by requestId.
Search SFA licensed food establishments via data.gov.sg.
Browse SingStat dataset categories. Call without arguments to see top-level categories, or provide a category to see its datasets.
Compare multiple SingStat indicators side by side. Useful for correlating economic, demographic, or trade data.
Search SingStat Table Builder for datasets matching a keyword. Returns dataset IDs, titles, and update frequency.
Retrieve data from a specific SingStat table. Use sg_singstat_search first to find table IDs.
Get time series data for a specific indicator from a SingStat table. Returns values for each period in the specified year range.
Search Sport Singapore public facilities with optional facility-type, postal-code, or proximity filters.
Get Singapore visitor arrival statistics from STB via data.gov.sg.
Look up a local tool invocation audit record by traceId.
Rank route candidates by accessibility signals for wheelchair, reduced-walk, and elder-friendly modes.
Run counterfactual transit-plan scenarios against a baseline to compare policy and decision deltas.
Score watched bus stops and services with deterministic transit-health grades and risk drivers.
Cluster incidents, road events, and traffic camera context into impact-ranked transit hotspots.
Return transit-model quality metrics including prediction, calibration, and recommendation success rates.
Generate tenant-aware objective transit plans with deterministic policy filtering and explainers.
Build a bounded transit-operations brief combining health, hotspots, and trend-aware action priorities.
Record recommendation outcomes to support transit-model quality and calibration tracking.
Return one transit intelligence payload with snapshot, health, hotspots, and ops briefing.
List transit policy-audit traces for governance and post-incident review.
Aggregate blocking rules and acceptance rates from transit policy-audit traces.
Replay a historical transit policy trace with patched constraints before production rollout.
Estimate origin-destination transit reliability with ETA bands, volatility, and candidate service plans.
Estimate missed-transfer probability and fallback options for a transfer stop and service pair.
Build a live transport operations brief over LTA bus arrivals, train alerts, and traffic incidents.
Get URA development charge rates by use group and sector. Rates are updated semi-annually.
Get URA master plan data for a location or planning area. Returns zoning information, gross plot ratio, and land use designations.
Get property transaction data from URA. Includes resale and rental prices for private residential, commercial, and industrial properties.
